full_text:
Bixie иҫҹйӮӘ
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Bixie (иҫҹйӮӘ). Delivered Cao RuiвҖҷs edicts to Sima Yi. Bixie was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom.
